title: Dell improves security and complaint handling practices following breaches and OPC Investigation
summary: After receiving a “tech support scam” call, two Dell customers complained that their personal information was disclosed to fraudsters and that Dell would not take their concerns about a breach seriously. Dell discovered that two employees of its service provider sold customer information on two separate occasions. Dell took a number of re...
